# SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.always

**Case**

Always display an alert when using Presenter Overlay.

## Declaration

```swift
case always
```

## Alerting Presenters

- **SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.never**: Never display an alert when using Presenter Overlay.
- **SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.system**: Displays an alert when using Presenter Overlay based on the System Settings.
